title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Lilith, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, CP0, Luffy as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no record of the "Gomu-gomu no mi",

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: written in the old devil fruit encyclopedia at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even if you say that, Luffy himself called it the "Gomu-gomu no mi"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a beautiful form...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This form looks exactly like the God...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Beep deep

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: mentioned in the ancient documents!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A God?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is happy we're talking about here! He's just an idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... "The warrior of liberation" that is always playful and,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: puts a smile on the people's faces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Also known as..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Sun God - Nika!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nika? Never heard of it..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course you haven't... because that name has been erased from history!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But as long as people continue to yearn for it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's existence will never disappear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The desires of all things are born in this world"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Take for example...

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: The devil fruits has the same concept...

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: The devil fruits are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "potential" of "human evolution" that humanity wished for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: there- fore... These "abnor- Malities"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Oh, wouldn't it be nice if I was like that.." "Wouldn't it be great if I was like this!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are hated by the sea, the mother of all nature!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have the "powers" of the diverse future of humankind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Their existence is burdened with this punishment!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: These so called Devil Fruit Users are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: beings living in a completely different world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That many people wished for and envisioned!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is my theory!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no need to think about whether there is a god or not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Isn't this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So interest- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ahaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today is supposed to be my day off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No, sento- Maru!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is, CPO is aiming for my life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, old man punk! What should I do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My Apolo- Gies, but could you drive CPO away from this island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... won't that make me a defector too!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right... I should've asked for your opinion first.

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: The CIPHER POL are Allies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The pirates are the enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should I order them to fight along- side CPO?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: sento- Maru... in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was me who picked you up when you had nothing to eat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So what will you do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's quite the "pressure" you're putting me on!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
